products.title: SH504 Tractor
products.description: The SinoHarvest SH504 is a professional-grade agricultural tractor designed for modern farming operations. Powered by a highly-efficient 4100B-4a engine, delivering a robust 50 horsepower, it provides an exceptional balance of torque and fuel efficiency. The 4WD drivetrain, paired with a versatile 8+2 transmission, ensures optimal traction and seamless power delivery across challenging terrains. Weighing in at 2,370 kg, it offers a stable platform for heavy-duty implements, while the 766 RPM PTO provides dependable power transfer for a wide range of attachments. Built for endurance and operational excellence, the SH504 stands as an indispensable asset for maximizing productivity in the field.
